title: Org 設備分布
subtitle: 7 個 org · License 狀態作為「Cloud 可管理 / 離線」代理指標
compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const orgs = (data) => (data.dist && data.dist.orgs) || []; const devices = (data) => (data.dist && data.dist.devices) || []; const sum = (arr, f) => arr.reduce((a,o)=>a+(f(o)||0),0); cf.summary = (data) => { const os = orgs(data); const withDev = os.filter(o => o.total > 0); const total = sum(os, o => o.total); const exp = sum(os, o => o.expired); const act = sum(os, o => o.active); const pct = total ? Math.round(exp*100/total) : 0; return `管理 ${os.length} 個 org，其中 ${withDev.length} 個有設備。可見 ${total} 台設備裡 ${act} 台 license active（Cloud 可管），${exp} 台已過期（${pct}% 視為離線）。`; }; cf.kpi_orgs = (data) => orgs(data).length; cf.kpi_orgs_sub = (data) => { const w = orgs(data).filter(o => o.total > 0).length; return `${w} 個有設備`; }; cf.kpi_total = (data) => sum(orgs(data), o => o.total); cf.kpi_total_sub = (data) => `${sum(orgs(data), o => o.assigned)} 已指派 network`; cf.kpi_active = (data) => sum(orgs(data), o => o.active); cf.kpi_active_sub = (data) => { const t = sum(orgs(data), o => o.total); const a = sum(orgs(data), o => o.active); return t ? `${Math.round(a*100/t)}% of fleet` : '—'; }; cf.kpi_expired = (data) => sum(orgs(data), o => o.expired); cf.kpi_expired_sub = (data) => { const t = sum(orgs(data), o => o.total); const e = sum(orgs(data), o => o.expired); return t ? `${Math.round(e*100/t)}% of fleet` : '—'; }; cf.license_segments = (data) => { const a = sum(orgs(data), o => o.active); const e = sum(orgs(data), o => o.expired); const x = sum(orgs(data), o => o.other); return [ { label: 'Active', value: a, severity: 'success' }, { label: 'Expired', value: e, severity: 'critical' }, { label: 'Other', value: x, severity: 'muted' } ].filter(s => s.value > 0); }; cf.type_segments = (data) => { const agg = {}; orgs(data).forEach(o => Object.entries(o.by_type || {}).forEach(([t,v]) => { agg[t] = (agg[t] || 0) + v.total; })); const palette = { ap: 'info', switch: 'brand', gateway: 'warning', pdu: 'success', camera: 'critical', nvs: 'muted', switch_extender: 'success', bsc: 'muted', epc: 'warning', ezmaster: 'muted' }; return Object.entries(agg).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([t,v]) => ({ label: t, value: v, severity: palette[t] || 'muted' })); }; cf.expired_per_org = (data) => orgs(data).filter(o => o.expired > 0).sort((a,b) => b.expired - a.expired).map(o => ({ label: o.org_name, value: o.expired, color: 'crit' })); cf.active_per_org = (data) => orgs(data).filter(o => o.active > 0).sort((a,b) => b.active - a.active).map(o => ({ label: o.org_name, value: o.active, color: 'ok' })); cf.fleet_total = (data) => sum(orgs(data), o => o.total); })();

sections.title: 跨 Org 設備健康摘要
設備類型分布（全 org 加總）
各 Org License 狀態（Active 上 / Expired 下）
